selected_dialects.reason: Flange is a rotationally symmetric solid: rectangular radial-axial profile revolved around center axis, with center bore, annular grooves on both faces, and circular bolt hole pattern — all covered by axisymmetric dialect operations (revolve_profile, cut_center_bore, cut_annular_groove, cut_circular_hole_pattern).
